name: esportes-victurino
description: Site profissional de fotografia — Davi Victurino

scripts.deploy: node scripts/optimize-images.js && node scripts/generate-gallery.js && git add . && git diff --cached --quiet && echo "Nenhuma alteracao para publicar." || git commit -m "Atualiza galeria e fotos" && git push origin main
scripts.deploy:fotos: git add assets/img && git commit -m "Adiciona novas fotos" && git push origin main
